title: Nested invoice form with sort_param/drop_param
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/nested_invoice_form.ex has a broken inputs_for implementation. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/invoice_live/edit.ex (module MyAppWeb.InvoiceLive.Edit): (1) use <.inputs_for :let={li} field={@form[:line_items]}>, (2) include a hidden sort input inside the inputs_for: <input type="hidden" name="invoice[line_items_sort][]" value={li.index} />, (3) a remove button that uses name="invoice[line_items_drop][]" value={li.index}, (4) an "Add line" button AFTER the inputs_for with name="invoice[line_items_sort][]" value="new", (5) use to_form and action :validate in the handle_event validate. Button position matters — 'add' must come AFTER the list.
tier_rationale: sort_param/drop_param mechanic is not widely known. Multi-piece change to get right.
